'''dawumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachline|coachline]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachline|coachline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dawumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæwimith|dæwimith]] || [[word:dæwimij|dæwimij]] || [[word:dæwimish|dæwimish]] || [[word:dæwimi|dæwimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawuwumuth|dawuwumuth]] || [[word:dawuwumuj|dawuwumuj]] || [[word:dawuwumush|dawuwumush]] || [[word:dawuwumu|dawuwumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawumuth|dawumuth]] || [[word:dawumuj|dawumuj]] || [[word:dawumush|dawumush]] || [[word:dawumu|dawumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawufmuth|dawufmuth]] || [[word:dawufmuj|dawufmuj]] || [[word:dawufmush|dawufmush]] || [[word:dawufmuf|dawufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dawumuthu|dawumuthu]] || [[word:dawumuju|dawumuju]] || [[word:dawumushu|dawumushu]] || [[word:dawumuku|dawumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dawumuth|dawumuth]] || [[word:dawumuj|dawumuj]] || [[word:dawumush|dawumush]] || [[word:dawumu|dawumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dawumuthul|dawumuthul]] || [[word:dawumujul|dawumujul]] || [[word:dawumushul|dawumushul]] || [[word:dawumukul|dawumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dawumuthuthu|dawumuthuthu]] || [[word:dawumujuju|dawumujuju]] || [[word:dawumushushu|dawumushushu]] || [[word:dawumuku|dawumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dawumuthun|dawumuthun]] || [[word:dawumujun|dawumujun]] || [[word:dawumushun|dawumushun]] || [[word:dawumukun|dawumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dawumuthuoro|dawumuthuoro]] || [[word:dawumujuoro|dawumujuoro]] || [[word:dawumushuoro|dawumushuoro]] || [[word:dawumukuoro|dawumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
